Query.Sql: with ha as ( select distinct Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.NonPrimaryPathway.DateOfNonPrimaryCancerDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed' as DateOfNonPrimaryCancerDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, -- Metastatic Site from progression pathway. Unnested because MetastaticTypeAndSiteProgression may contain multiple entries. unnest( [ [Record ->> '$.NonPrimaryPathway.Progression.MetastaticTypeAndSiteProgression.MetastaticSite.@code'], Record ->> '$.NonPrimaryPathway.Progression.MetastaticTypeAndSiteProgression[*].MetastaticSite.@code' ], recursive := true ) as MetastaticSite from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901 where type = 'HA' ) select distinct NhsNumber, DateOfNonPrimaryCancerDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, MetastaticSite from ha where MetastaticSite is not null and MetastaticSite != '97';

Explanation.Description: Is the date where the Non Primary Cancer PATIENT DIAGNOSIS was confirmed or agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF NON PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: The site of the metastatic disease at PATIENT DIAGNOSIS during a Cancer Care Spell (progression pathway).
